title: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Noise Cancelling Headphones
description:
Industry-leading active noise cancellation with adaptive sound control for travel and work.
Up to 30 hours battery backup with quick charge support and crystal-clear voice calling.

title: Samsung 55-inch 4K UHD Smart TV
description:
Vivid 4K picture quality with HDR support and ultra-slim bezel design.
Built-in streaming apps and voice assistant compatibility for a complete home entertainment setup.

title: Apple iPad 10th Gen 64GB Wi-Fi
description:
Powerful A14 Bionic performance for work, entertainment, and online classes.
All-day battery life with a vivid display ideal for reading, drawing, and streaming.

title: Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse
description:
Ergonomic premium mouse with ultra-fast MagSpeed scrolling and silent clicks.
Perfect for productivity workflows with multi-device pairing and USB-C charging.

title: boAt Stone 1200 Bluetooth Party Speaker
description:
Portable high-output speaker with punchy bass and IPX7 splash resistance.
Ideal for indoor gatherings and weekend trips with long battery backup.

title: Levi's Slim Fit Stretch Denim Jeans
description:
Classic slim-fit silhouette crafted with stretch denim for all-day comfort.
Pairs effortlessly with tees, shirts, and sneakers for smart-casual styling.

title: Allen Solly Men's Solid Casual Shirt
description:
Breathable cotton-blend shirt with modern fit and premium finish.
Suitable for office Fridays, dinners, and everyday polished looks.

title: BIBA Women's Printed Anarkali Kurta
description:
Elegant ethnic wear with vibrant print and flattering flare cut.
Soft fabric ensures comfort for festive events and day-long occasions.

title: Puma Running Shoes with Cushioned Sole
description:
Lightweight running shoes designed for shock absorption and stability.
Breathable mesh upper keeps feet cool during workouts and daily walks.

title: Titan Neo Analog Stainless Steel Watch
description:
Premium stainless steel watch with minimalist analog dial and durable strap.
A timeless accessory suitable for business attire and formal occasions.

title: Atomic Habits by James Clear
description:
Bestselling self-improvement guide focused on building systems over goals.
Practical frameworks and examples make it actionable for daily life and work.

title: The Psychology of Money by Morgan Housel
description:
Insightful personal finance book explaining behavior-driven wealth decisions.
Written in short, engaging chapters with real-world investing lessons.

title: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban
description:
Beloved fantasy novel with immersive storytelling and unforgettable characters.
A perfect addition for collectors and first-time readers alike.

title: Deep Work by Cal Newport
description:
Productivity classic on cultivating focus in a distraction-heavy world.
Provides practical methods to improve concentration and output quality.

title: The Alchemist by Paulo Coelho
description:
Inspirational fiction centered on purpose, dreams, and persistence.
Simple prose and profound themes make it a long-time reader favorite.

title: Philips Air Fryer 4.1L Digital
description:
Rapid air technology for crispy cooking with less oil and even heating.
Preset controls simplify daily meals from fries to grilled vegetables.

title: Prestige Stainless Steel Cookware Set (5 pcs)
description:
Durable multi-purpose cookware set suitable for induction and gas stovetops.
Mirror-finish steel body with ergonomic handles for safe everyday use.

title: IKEA MALM Bedside Table Walnut Finish
description:
Compact bedside table with smooth drawer operation and clean modern styling.
Ideal for organizing essentials while complementing contemporary bedrooms.

title: Dyson V8 Cordless Vacuum Cleaner
description:
Powerful suction with cordless convenience for quick whole-home cleaning.
Includes multi-surface attachments and up to 40 minutes runtime.

title: SleepyCat Orthopedic Memory Foam Mattress
description:
Pressure-relieving memory foam mattress engineered for spinal alignment.
Breathable fabric top layer improves comfort during long summer nights.

title: Nivia Storm Football Size 5
description:
Match-ready football with durable outer layer and consistent flight control.
Designed for training grounds, turf games, and weekend tournaments.

title: Yonex GR 303 Badminton Racket Combo
description:
Lightweight graphite rackets offering quick swings and balanced control.
Great for beginners and intermediate players practicing footwork and smashes.

title: Decathlon 20kg Adjustable Dumbbell Set
description:
Home-gym friendly adjustable dumbbells for progressive strength training.
Secure locking mechanism ensures safe workouts for multiple exercises.

title: Adidas Yoga Mat 8mm Anti-Slip
description:
Cushioned anti-slip mat for yoga, stretching, and bodyweight routines.
Moisture-resistant surface is easy to clean and durable for daily practice.

title: Cosco Cricket Kit Bag with Wheels
description:
Spacious cricket bag with reinforced compartments for bat, pads, and gloves.
Heavy-duty wheel base makes travel easy for practice and match days.
